scripts.pkg: npm run build && xcopy /E /I /Y front-end\dist dist\front-end\dist && xcopy /E /I /Y node_modules\sqlite3\build\Release dist\node_modules\sqlite3\build\Release && mkdir dist\log\service && pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/quick-dist.exe && node scripts/create-dist-zip.js
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run build && cp -r front-end/dist dist/front-end/dist && cp -r node_modules/sqlite3/build/Release dist/node_modules/sqlite3/build/Release && mkdir -p dist/log/service && pkg . --targets node18-linux-x64 --output dist/quick-dist && node scripts/create-dist-zip.js
scripts.pkg:mac: npm run build && cp -r front-end/dist dist/front-end/dist && cp -r node_modules/sqlite3/build/Release dist/node_modules/sqlite3/build/Release && mkdir -p dist/log/service && pkg . --targets node18-macos-x64 --output dist/quick-dist && node scripts/create-dist-zip.js
